role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (Betula pendula) and forest composition.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the ground truth (Russia). The agents provided solid, image-grounded evidence (birch forests, road quality, utility poles). The tournament successfully used this evidence to distinguish Russia from the closest competitor (Belarus), correctly favoring the Russian hypothesis based on the specific combination of visual cues.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of birch forests and cracked asphalt match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Utility pole descriptions match the image.
